title: Launch Seal Drop
description: Slide an official launch cradle with one thumb to catch approved payloads and reject fake drops before the desert countdown burns out.

howToPlayJson.title: Launch Seal Drop
howToPlayJson.objective: Survive a 3-minute launch window by catching only the currently authorized falling launch items, building combo score, and avoiding enough bad pickups to keep the launch from being canceled.

controls.input: Drag left or right with one thumb along the bottom lane
controls.outcome: Repositions the catcher under falling items

controls.input: Tap anywhere with the other thumb or quick-tap above the cradle
controls.outcome: Switches the cradle between two permit modes shown by a large icon

controls.input: Double-tap when the siren meter is full
controls.outcome: Blasts away nearby decoys but resets combo

steps: Approved launch parts, fuel seals, and command stamps fall from the top of the screen in curved desert wind patterns.
Match the cradle's current permit mode to the item type you want to catch; wrong catches count as security breaches.
Every few seconds Control issues a new 'Official Launch Order' that flips which item type is valid and which one becomes contraband.
Counterfeit posters, leaked crates, and dud flares begin mixing into the stream and must be dodged entirely.
Miss too many valid items or catch three contraband drops and the launch is scrubbed.
howToPlayJson.scoring: Each valid catch scores points; consecutive valid catches increase a launch multiplier up to x8. Catching the exact next item named in the current order grants bonus points and extends combo time. Local offline leaderb o
tips: Stay near center so thumb travel stays short when the order flips.
Watch the large order banner, not the item art; the twist is about authorization, not rarity.
Use panic clear only when contraband is stacked over a valid cluster.
Combo is safer than greed: one bad catch hurts more than one missed catch late game.
